title: GitHub MCP Server for Claude

detailMarkdown:
# GitHub MCP Server for Claude

Official GitHub MCP server providing comprehensive GitHub API access for repository management, file operations, and search functionality

## Trust
- Source: source-backed
- Package: maintainer-built/verified package
- Review: unclaimed

## Install
```bash
claude mcp add github --env GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=YOUR_TOKEN -- npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-github && claude mcp list
```

## Config
```json
{
  "github": {
    "env": {
      "GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN": "${GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN}"
    },
    "args": [
      "-y",
      "@modelcontextprotocol/server-github"
    ],
    "command": "npx"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp add github --env GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=YOUR_TOKEN -- npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-github && claude mcp list
